title: Nursery Rhyme. DLXXI. Natural History.
content:
Jack Sprat
            Had a cat,
        It had but one ear;
            It went to buy butter,
        When butter was dear.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DLXXI. Natural History." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
